protocols.Paper_title: A novel method to recover inclusion body protein from recombinant E. coli fed-batch processes based on phage ΦX174-derived lysis protein E
protocols.Evidence: E-lysis induced by shifting temperature to 42 °C; cells resuspended in buffer (50 mM Tris, 5 mM DTT, 1 mM EDTA) and washed once; homogenized at 1500 bar
